caption:
The clock on the wall ticked past midnight, but the air in the professor's office remained thick and warm 🕯️

I adjusted the hem of my pencil skirt 👠, feeling the fabric slide against my thighs as I leaned over the desk. The silk blouse I wore clung to my curves, the neckline slightly lower than the strict code demanded, hinting at what lay beneath the blazer. He had asked for extra help, but as I handed him the graded papers, the question on his lips was far more dangerous than any equation on the page 📚. I smelled his cologne mixing with the scent of old books and coffee, a heady blend that made my breath hitch. Every time he looked up, his eyes traveled over the expanse of my chest before meeting my gaze, and I let a small, knowing smile play on my lips. Tonight wasn't about teaching; it was about temptation. 👩‍🏫

#UniversityLife #TeacherVibes #AcademicAllure #CurvesAndBooks #LateNightGrading #ProfessorStyle #SeductiveTeacher #CampusSecrets 🌶️
